Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly display name for the assessment.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly description for the assessment.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this assessment.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this assessment.
  • source_database_connection - (Required) (Updatable) The source connection reference for the assessment.
  • target_database_connection - (Required) (Updatable) The target connection reference for the assessment.
  • network_speed_megabit_per_second - (Required) (Updatable) The expected network speed for the migration path.
  • acceptable_downtime - (Required) (Updatable) The acceptable application downtime for the assessment.
  • database_data_size - (Required) (Updatable) The source database size bucket used by the assessment.
  • ddl_expectation - (Required) (Updatable) The expected DDL workload during migration.
  • creation_type - (Optional) (Updatable) Whether the assessment is created only or also runs assessors.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • database_combination - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • include_objects - (Optional) The published controller-backed Assessment rollout does not support the object-helper families behind this field.
  • exclude_objects - (Optional) The published controller-backed Assessment rollout does not support the object-helper families behind this field.
  • bulk_include_exclude_data - (Optional) The published controller-backed Assessment rollout does not support the object-helper families behind this field.
